commands.review_summary:
The branch gates embedded runner tool construction on `supportsModelTools`, adds a regression test for no-tool models, and carries a schema cache return-type cleanup that current main already contains.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +15. Total +16 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can enter `createOpenClawCodingTools` when tools are otherwise enabled even if `supportsModelTools` returns false. I did not run a live no-tool model turn.

target.title: perf(agents): skip tool prep for toolless models
target.body:
## Summary

- skip OpenClaw runtime tool construction when the selected model declares `compat.supportsTools: false`
- add regression coverage so no-tool small-model runs do not pay the tool factory/import cost before discarding tools
- include the CI/Linux lint unblocker for the agents lane schema cache return type

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.cwd-split.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/openai-tool-schema.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_d4149e5646fc`, run `run_5686d0277874`, exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Small/no-tool local models that set `compat.supportsTools: false` no longer build the full OpenClaw runtime tool surface before dropping it from the model prompt.

Real environment tested: Local linked OpenClaw worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate runner.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.cwd-split.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: The focused regression test passed 3/3 after the final rebase; AWS Crabbox `run_5686d0277874` completed `pnpm check:changed` with exit 0.

Observed result after fix: The regression asserts `createOpenClawCodingTools` is not called when `supportsModelTools` returns false, while normal tool-enabled runs still construct tools.

What was not tested: A live Ollama/API small-model agent turn was not run in this PR; the follow-up small-model live matrix should cover Ollama plus representative small hosted model families.
target.author: vincentkoc
